name: Fehu
upright: the diff brings tangible value; the merchant's bell rings.
reversed: loss; effort spent without harvest.

name: Uruz
upright: raw refactoring strength; the codebase grows muscle.
reversed: brute force where finesse was needed.

name: Thurisaz
upright: a guardian thorn against bugs; defensive coding triumphs.
reversed: a sharp edge turned inward; self-inflicted wounds in the logic.

name: Ansuz
upright: the commit message rings clear; the reviewers hear and nod.
reversed: miscommunication; the PR description hides the truth.

name: Raidho
upright: the change moves along the right path; CI hums in cadence.
reversed: a detour through rebases; the journey lengthens.

name: Kenaz
upright: illumination — a hidden pattern revealed to the craftsman.
reversed: a sputtering torch; understanding falters mid-review.

name: Gebo
upright: a generous PR; pair-programming spirits smile.
reversed: imbalance; one author labors while others reap.

name: Wunjo
upright: the team rejoices; review threads close with thumbs-up.
reversed: discord in the channel; bikeshedding looms.

name: Hagalaz
upright: a sudden storm of failing tests; nature's audit.
reversed: lingering damage; flakes that refuse to thaw.

name: Nauthiz
upright: the constraint forges the design; necessity sharpens the diff.
reversed: starvation of resources; the build runs out of memory.

name: Isa
upright: freeze the branch; pause before pushing further.
reversed: a thaw begins; the deadlock breaks.

name: Jera
upright: the slow seeds of past commits ripen in this merge.
reversed: an early harvest; the feature ships before it is ready.

name: Eihwaz
upright: the architecture holds; deep roots steady the new branch.
reversed: a brittle support; the load-bearing module groans.

name: Perthro
upright: the unknown unknowns; an edge case waits to be cast.
reversed: secrets hoarded; a flaky test refuses to confess.

name: Algiz
upright: a guard rune over production; the diff is shielded.
reversed: lowered defenses; a missing assertion invites grief.

name: Sowilo
upright: the sun breaks through; green checks across the board.
reversed: blinding light; over-eager optimism hides a regression.

name: Tiwaz
upright: a fair trade — complexity removed at the cost of cleverness.
reversed: honor stained; a hot-fix bypasses the review covenant.

name: Berkano
upright: fresh modules sprout; a clean abstraction takes root.
reversed: stunted growth; the new feature struggles to germinate.

name: Ehwaz
upright: author and reviewer ride as one; momentum carries the PR.
reversed: the steed bucks; coordination falters between contributors.

name: Mannaz
upright: the change honors its users; humane defaults prevail.
reversed: ego in the diff; cleverness over clarity.

name: Laguz
upright: the diff flows naturally through the codebase; no friction.
reversed: a stagnant pool; the abstraction does not drain into existing code.

name: Ingwaz
upright: the work is complete in itself; a self-contained release.
reversed: an unfinished idea released too soon; the seed scattered.

name: Dagaz
upright: dawn over the merge queue; a paradigm shift in this PR.
reversed: the long night; insight delayed by another sprint.

name: Othala
upright: the change respects the codebase's lineage; conventions upheld.
reversed: an heirloom discarded; a long-standing pattern broken without cause.
